title: SEO Outreach Project Management Made Easy
summary: How to manage SEO outreach campaigns without losing track.
show_notes_text:
### The System

Irfan and his team use Google Sheets as the primary tool for tracking outreach campaigns, used in combination with Slack and Trello.

### Key Features of the System

Points-Based Commission Structure:
- Team members earn points (and higher commission) for earning backlinks with a higher Domain Rating (DR)
- This incentivizes quality over quantity in backlink acquisition

Multi-Team / Micro-Team Structure:
- Multiple micro-teams work on the same projects simultaneously
- Benefits include:
  - Healthy internal competition
  - Better ability to meet client goals and targets
  - Redundancy if one team hits a wall

### Why This Matters

Outreach for quality whitehat backlinks is:
- Extremely time-consuming
- At times unpredictable
- Dependent on the responsiveness and decisions of third parties (journalists, editors, site owners)

Having a structured, incentivized system helps the team stay motivated and on-target across long-running campaigns.
transcript_text: No transcript available for this episode.
